channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Cut the red tape: 39 financial giants demand an emergency fast-track for Europe's blockchain pilot
item.description: The firms requested separating the DLT pilot regime from a larger package of 18 financial laws to allow for quicker updates and build real markets.

item.title: UK invites crypto giant Bybit to London to win over some of UAE’s innovation shine
item.description: Bybit CEO Ben Zhou was invited to meetings in the U.K. this week with government-linked bodies including the FCA and House of Lords.

item.title: European banks are at risk of losing customers to rivals with better crypto tools
item.description: A new study found that while European investors find crypto complex, they are increasingly willing to switch banks to find a trusted partner that offers secure and regulated digital asset services.

item.title: DoorDash is bringing stablecoin payments to masses with Stripe-backed blockchain
item.description: The delivery service is working with the Stripe-led blockchain firm Tempo to bring stablecoin payouts to its global marketplace, replacing fragmented regional rails.

item.title: UK plans payments rule changes for stablecoins, tokenized deposits
item.description: The UK government plans a stablecoin and tokenization rules overhaul, appointing former FCA official Chris Woolard to support work on its digital markets strategy.

item.title: Block’s Cash App Launches Accounts for Young Kids—Without Bitcoin Access
item.description: Cash App joins the youth banking race with high-yield savings, but the managed kid accounts can’t tap into the app’s Bitcoin features.

item.title: Optimism Bills 'Privacy Boost' as Turning Point for Enterprises on Ethereum
item.description: The layer-2 Ethereum scaling network’s privacy offering is expected to expand to additional blockchains.

item.title: South Korea tax agency opens bidding for crypto tracing tool
item.description: South Korea's tax authority is looking to build crypto transaction tracking software that can help track potential tax evaders.

item.title: Crypto hackers stole $17B over past 10 years: DefiLlama
item.description: Private key compromises led crypto hack losses over the past decade as recent DeFi exploits show attackers moving beyond smart contract bugs.

item.title: Canton, ZKsync clash over how blockchains enforce rules
item.description: Matter Labs’ Alex Gluchowski says Canton isn’t a blockchain, while Digital Asset co-founders argue public chains aren’t that different.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) gains 3.3% while index moves lower
item.description: Aave (AAVE), up 1.9% from Monday, joined Stellar (XLM) as a top performer.

item.title: Bank of Korea's New Governor Prioritizes CBDCs Over Stablecoins in First Policy Address
item.description: The central bank chief outlined digital finance priorities while legislative debates continue over private stablecoin frameworks.

item.title: XRP holders back in profit as price eyes potential 55% breakout
item.description: Most XRP investors are back in profit, increasing the chance for a rally to $2.24, but bulls must first hold the price above $1.40.

item.title: Iran Scammers Demand Bitcoin, USDT for Transit Through Strait of Hormuz: Report
item.description: Fake crypto clearance demands are targeting ships stranded at Hormuz as the Iran conflict enters its third month.

item.title: VIX drops 45% in three weeks: Is Bitcoin price ready to retake $80K?
item.description: A falling VIX signals improving risk appetite, boosting Bitcoin’s chances of attracting fresh demand and breaking above the $80,000 level.

item.title: Morning Minute: Saylor's $2.54B Buy Buoys Bitcoin
item.description: Michael Saylor and Tom Lee continued to buy BTC and ETH in big size, while Aave published its incident report from the KelpDAO exploit.

item.title: BitMEX taps Zodia Custody for off-exchange collateral trading
item.description: BitMEX has partnered with Zodia Custody to enable institutional crypto derivatives trading via off-exchange collateral held in segregated custody.

item.title: Almost 80% of Japan's institutional investors plan to buy crypto within 3 years, survey finds
item.description: A survey by Nomura reveals that roughly 80% of Japan's investment professionals plan to allocate up to 5% of their portfolios to digital assets by 2029.

item.title: Bitcoin trades above a make-or-break level ahead of Warsh hearing
item.description: What you need to know for April 21, 2026

item.title: Grandson of Mob Boss John Gotti Sentenced for Funneling Stolen COVID Funds Into Crypto
item.description: The grandson of Gambino crime boss John Gotti pleaded guilty to wire fraud after funneling $420K in stolen pandemic relief funds into crypto.

item.title: Kelp DAO attacker moves $175M in Ether after exploit: Arkham
item.description: The Kelp DAO attacker has moved $175 million of stolen Ether in an apparent bid to start laundering it after the $290 million exploit.

item.title: Bitcoin Resistance at $78K and $83K Could Cap Rally: Schwab
item.description: The Schwab Center for Financial Research warned that Bitcoin faces key resistance between $78,000 and $83,000 investor cost basis levels.

item.title: Bitcoin climbs as risk sentiment improves, altcoins hit by exploit concerns
item.description: Bitcoin advanced while altcoins continued to struggle after the weekend's DeFi exploit, with markets eyeing Middle East tensions and shifting risk sentiment.

item.title: Tether( @tether) has minted 2B $USDT on #Ethereum over the past 3 days. intel.arkm.com/explorer/entit… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9WdmZvWnJxQ0dURGl6UVV2YWN3c0VEdmZkMEx6TU5mcl80X1dtUHBTLThXQW1iSVNuZ0ljTFJ3NnBIZ2JjaFFvVW5pSW9ucnNPVUszdVA1RXYxZTRrbTRTNFJR?oc=5" target="_blank">Tether( @tether) has minted 2B $US…

item.title: Crypto scammers offer ‘safe passage’ through Hormuz. At least one ship may have been conned.
item.description: Marisks, a maritime risk company, alerted ships stranded by the Hormuz blockade to scammers posing as Iranian authorities asking for bitcoin or USDT.

item.title: Bank of Korea’s new governor signals CBDC and bank token push, skips stablecoins in key address
item.description: The BOK will increase scrutiny of crypto markets and non-bank finance, and will also modernize currency markets for 24-hour foreign exchange trading, he said.

item.title: Arbitrum Security Council Freezes $71.5M in Ethereum Linked to $292M KelpDAO Exploit
item.description: Arbitrum's emergency response to the KelpDAO exploit has sparked praise and criticism over the network's ability to freeze stolen assets.

item.title: Scammers demand crypto from stranded ships in Strait of Hormuz: Report
item.description: Shipping companies with vessels stranded near the Strait of Hormuz are being targeted by scammers posing as Iranian authorities, demanding Bitcoin or USDt for safe passage.

item.title: Strategy overtakes BlackRock IBIT in bitcoin holdings after bear market buying
item.description: Leveraged accumulation and new capital tools push MSTR ahead of the world’s largest spot bitcoin ETF.

item.title: Bitcoin is now calmer than South Korea's stock market. Here's why it matters
item.description: Bitcoin's comparative stability during geopolitical turmoil has reinforced its appeal as a hedge.

item.title: Philippines SEC flags dYdX, six crypto platforms as unauthorized
item.description: Promoters of flagged platforms may face fines of up to 5 million Philippine pesos ($89,000) or up to 21 years in prison under Philippine securities law.

item.title: KelpDAO hackers are laundering millions in stolen crypto, data show
item.description: KelpDAO hackers are moving $290M in stolen crypto across blockchains, using privacy tools to mask the trail as DeFi contagion fears move through the sector.

item.title: Bank of Korea governor backs CBDCs, deposit tokens in first address
item.description: New Bank of Korea Governor Hyun-Song Shin supported CBDCs and deposit tokens in his first address, while stablecoins were notably absent from his remarks.

item.title: Bitcoin risks losing $70K as Strategy's STRC slips below $100
item.description: STRC's dropped below its $100 par value, indicating that Strategy will likely pause Bitcoin buying this week, which could help the bears pull price down to $70,000.

item.title: European banks tap Fireblocks for MiCA-compliant euro stablecoin
item.description: A 12-bank European consortium led by Qivalis is partnering with Fireblocks to develop a regulated euro stablecoin under MiCA, targeting launch in the second half of 2026.

item.title: A dozen banks want a euro stablecoin. Fireblocks is making it happen
item.description: The Qivalis consortium is made up of: Banca Sella, BBVA, BNP Paribas, CaixaBank, Danske Bank, DekaBank, DZ BANK, ING, KBC, Raiffeisen Bank International, SEB, and UniCredit.

item.title: Inside the ‘fake police raid’ that forced a $1M Bitcoin transfer
item.description: A fake police raid enabled a $1 million Bitcoin robbery, exposing the rise of wrench attacks and the shift from digital hacks to physical crypto threats.

item.title: Singapore’s OCBC launches tokenized gold fund on Ethereum and Solana
item.description: The value of tokenized real-world assets on public blockchains is estimated at more than $29 billion, up more than 10% in the last 30 days.

item.title: Update on rsETH incident: WETH reserves on the Ethereum Core V3 market have been unfrozen and users can supply WETH to Ethereum Core V3 again. WETH LTV remains at 0. WETH reserves on Ethereum Prime, Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, and Linea remain - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTE1LZmpjYU9ST2Z2Z0RhMWZJOHVnbVlOYzN4OXVjMEZtNk9yWDV3alJjYklhZjJGWnV6ZU0xRWp3RDZjQWZRcUF0Q01qMUJ6aDE3NlFydGdxQWw?oc=5" target="_blank">Update on rsETH incident: WETH reserves on the …

item.title: Ok. I'm officially announcing: the most decentralized blockchain in the world is Tron. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBVRTh3U2hkeWllZjlwcHNEVlU3X3FqaUlhQUFUc1l0N25Bd25FOVZvQy10NF9vRmhLRTdLQVpaSXBtSWUtWGpJX1EyVnktcWFrSy1jREl5U2NONDBqaEU1ejNTVXI?oc=5" target="_blank">Ok. I'm officially announcing: …

item.title: 🚨 NOW: Over $17B has been stolen across 518 crypto hacks in the past 10 years, according to DefiLlama. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9QSVJHS21DR19TTEJFWXRMSEdVeE5fOUJTS1BJZVBtV2h1Vks1ekxFTG00c2RjZWRoY0t2Z2p2YzJZdThGeURCcE9sckh6Z1VwM2s5RTBKTkJzSUZ3OUVGcGIzWEw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NOW: Over $17B has been stol…

item.title: Arbitrum freezes $71M of Ether connected to Kelp exploit
item.description: Griff Green, a member of Arbitrum’s security council, said the group acted with input from law enforcement and “did not make this decision lightly."

item.title: US senator urges delay of CLARITY Act Senate markup until May: Report
item.description: US Senator Thom Tillis said members of the crypto and banking industries still need more time to be heard.

item.title: Arbitrum freezes $71 million in ether tied to Kelp DAO exploit
item.description: The layer-2 network's security council moved 30,766 ETH to a frozen intermediary wallet, accessible only via further governance action.

item.title: Bitcoin reclaims $75,000 as Iran ceasefire talks advance, equities rally resumes
item.description: Bitcoin traded at $75,733 on Tuesday morning, up 1.5% over 24 hours, as Iran signaled it will send a team to Pakistan talks and Brent crude slipped ahead of the Wednesday ceasefire deadline.

item.title: Ripple wants the XRP Ledger to be quantum-proof by 2028. Here is its plan
item.description: Ripple has laid out a four-phase plan to make the XRP Ledger quantum-resistant by 2028.

item.title: Code is ‘functional’ free speech under the First Amendment: Coin Center
item.description: Crypto software developers are concerned about whether they may be held criminally liable for publishing their software, following high-profile convictions last year.

item.title: Coinbase’s AI payments protocol x402 launches app store for AI agents
item.description: Coinbase’s x402 AI payments protocol has launched Agentic.market, a platform where AI agents can discover and use AI-friendly services.

item.title: NY lawmaker proposes ‘AI dividend’ to address potential job losses
item.description: The proposed AI dividend would be funded by taxes on AI use and equity stakes in AI companies, paying US citizens if automation meaningfully displaces workers.

item.title: I have not posted anything regarding crypto. My account was hacked. Some one is trying to hack my phone, email, Facebook, all my accounts tonight. This was NOT me. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5aQm44cThjTmlSWHk5MC1FS21DTFdmT3Fva29ObXIzUjQycHZFd0lVYUZRTFRJMTFPNlJrbkZRYTVSYjUwSDBaaC1pQ3Examx3S1I2RWZmSXM1ZjNsem4xOW5pVHE2cHM?oc=5" target="_blank">I have not posted anything …

item.title: Remember when they screamed bitcoin mining would boil the oceans? Data Center load in ERCOT is projected to be 25 times greater by 2032 and not a peep. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1FSE5MN2pzLWFiMlYwODJhb3NXWkZFcmkyckJMRUQyR3dWcG1jV0VQU204UVVSY3V6NGRBNGR0czc3VVJHZFVJTU1DcTZQeUQ0UXVUMWJDQkpBYkhjalI4?oc=5" target="_blank">Remember when they screamed bitcoin mi…

item.title: 🇺🇸 LATEST: Sen. Tillis urges Senate Banking to push the crypto market structure bill to a May markup to allow more time to finalize a bank-crypto stablecoin compromise, per Punchbowl. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFB6OWNzQy1pWHpmUFlYZTRBa1RtN1NMQ1RJcGEzOGF2bWxWLTZJdFcyNVF2RE9YcEg0VDE1Rmlwc3VDanlXbjJxQlplUlRWRDQzeEZqaWdBUjdGMmt5Ml9VRlUzUlQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 LATEST: Sen. Tillis urges …

item.title: Vitalik: L2s That Only Copy Ethereum Make No Sense Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin @VitalikButerin stated during his speech at the 4th Hong Kong Web3 Festival on April 20 that an L2 that merely clones Ethereum and makes it more centralized is meaning - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE03X2poWk0wczlCNkJEQnV2UDg3NlBTa1NuNTlzVi1XVmJkckJPS3RFRXBFZC02ODZQZkd6ZWcwb1RLb2FnZGtZalJpZE9qN2RFMEJIamZmcVA0VWdBc291aF9Mbw?oc=5" target="_blank">Vitalik: L2s That Only Copy Ethe…

item.title: Playdate Gaming Handheld Maker Bans Generative AI Tools for Development
item.description: Panic, the firm behind the Playdate handheld, now prohibits creative AI applications while preserving developer productivity aids.

item.title: Lose Your Job to AI? New York Lawmaker Proposes 'AI Dividend' Stimmy
item.description: Congressional candidate Alex Bores outlined a policy that would trigger payments to Americans if surging AI use reduces employment.

item.title: Alibaba Drops Qwen 3.6 Max Preview—Its Most Powerful Model Yet
item.description: Alibaba released Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, its most powerful AI model yet, topping six major coding benchmarks and posting gains in world knowledge and instruction following over its predecessor.

item.title: North Korea’s crypto heist playbook is expanding and DeFi keeps getting hit
item.description: More than $500 million was siphoned across the Drift and Kelp exploits in just over two weeks. What once looked like isolated breaches now resembles a sustained campaign, likely driven by the financial needs of a sanctioned state.

item.title: Aave could face up to $230 million in losses after Kelp DAO bridge exploit triggers DeFi chaos
item.description: Aave published a report outlining two possible outcomes: around $123 million in losses if damage is shared across all rsETH, or up to $230 million if confined to Layer 2s, with the final impact depending on how Kelp DAO allocates the short…

item.title: Bitcoin bounces above $76,000 as DeFi suffers $14 billion exodus after KelpDAO hack
item.description: Crypto steadied despite rising Iran tensions, but DeFi is reeling from one of the largest exploits of the year.

item.title: UK Gas Firm Faces Pushback Over Plans to Mine Bitcoin
item.description: Reabold Resources faced criticism for plans to use a gas field to mine Bitcoin, but said serving U.K. energy demand remains its main focus.
